<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Meet the LounGenie Leadership Team​</h2>



<p>Behind every LounGenie deployment is a leadership team with deep expertise in hospitality operations, corporate finance, and global brand marketing. Specifically, this team has guided Pool Safe Inc. from early-stage development to partnerships with some of the world’s most recognized hotel, resort, and waterpark brands. In short, their combined experience drives the strategy, innovation, and operational excellence behind the LounGenie smart cabana system.</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Board of Directors</h2>



<p><a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651"><br>
							<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="300" height="200" src="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/David-Berger-300x200.webp" alt="LounGenie leadership team member David Berger CEO" srcset="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/David-Berger-300x200.webp 300w, https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/David-Berger.webp 768w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px">								</a></p>



<h6 class="wp-block-heading">David Berger<br></h6>



<h5 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651">CEO<br>
</a></h5>



<p>Mr. David Berger is Executive Chairman and CEO, Pool Safe Inc. Mr. Berger was formerly the Director of Operations of Kiddie Ride Entertainment Limited, a company he founded to create fun and exciting amusement rides for children, located in shopping malls across southern Ontario. Prior to Kiddie Ride, Mr. Berger held the position of Managing Director at Jodami Enterprises Limited, an Engineering company that provided plumbing and electrical supplies across the Greater Toronto Area.</p>



<p><br>
																<a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651"><br>
							<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="238" height="300" src="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/steven-glaser-10.jpg-238x300.webp" alt="LounGenie leadership team COO CFO Steven Glaser" srcset="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/steven-glaser-10.jpg-238x300.webp 238w, https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/steven-glaser-10.jpg.webp 600w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 238px) 100vw, 238px">								</a></p>



<h6 class="wp-block-heading">Steven Glaser<br></h6>



<h5 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651">COO, CFO & Director<br>
</a></h5>



<p>Mr. Steven Glaser is Chief Operating Officer, Chief Financial Officer and Director, Pool Safe Inc. Mr. Glaser is a financial service executive with a diverse background in corporate finance, communications and governance for private and public companies. He spent the last eight years working in the corporate finance and investment banking arena focused on assisting late stage private and early stage public companies with strategic planning and capital raising. Prior to that, Mr. Glaser spent seven years as Vice President Corporate Affairs of Azure Dynamics Corporation. He was responsible for the company’s corporate governance, its domestic and international stock exchange listings, as well as the build-out of the company’s Investor Relations division. Mr. Glaser holds a Bachelor of Administrative Studies degree as well as an M.B.A. in finance.</p>



<p><br>
																<a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651"><br>
							<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="300" height="300" src="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/M3_7412-Steven-Mintz-Crop-BusinessPortraits.ca_-768x768.jpg-300x300.webp" alt="LounGenie leadership team Director Steven Mintz" srcset="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/M3_7412-Steven-Mintz-Crop-BusinessPortraits.ca_-768x768.jpg-300x300.webp 300w, https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/M3_7412-Steven-Mintz-Crop-BusinessPortraits.ca_-768x768.jpg-150x150.webp 150w, https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/M3_7412-Steven-Mintz-Crop-BusinessPortraits.ca_-768x768.jpg.webp 768w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px">								</a></p>



<h6 class="wp-block-heading">Steven Mintz</h6>



<h5 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651">Director</a></h5>



<p>Mr. Steven Mintz is Director, Pool Safe Inc. Mr. Mintz is a graduate from the University of Toronto and obtained his C.A. designation in June of 1992. Between 1992 and 1997, Mr. Mintz was employed by a boutique bankruptcy and insolvency firm. He obtained his Trustee in Bankruptcy license in 1995. Since January 1997 he has been a self-employed financial consultant, serving private individuals and companies as well as public companies in a variety of industries, including mining, oil and gas, real estate and investment strategies. He is currently a director of 22 Capital Corp, Everton Resources Inc., Mooncor Oil and Gas Corp. and Portage Biotech Inc.</p>



<p><br>
																<a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651"><br>
							<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="225" height="300" src="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/GD-pic-2022-1-768x1024.jpg-225x300.webp" alt="LounGenie leadership team Marketing Executive Gillian Deacon" srcset="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/GD-pic-2022-1-768x1024.jpg-225x300.webp 225w, https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/GD-pic-2022-1-768x1024.jpg.webp 768w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 225px) 100vw, 225px">								</a></p>



<h6 class="wp-block-heading">Gillian Deacon</h6>



<h5 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651">Marketing Executive<br>
</a></h5>



<p>Ms. Deacon brings over 15 years of integrated marketing experience across brand, experiential, partnership and content marketing. Ms. Deacon is currently the Vice President of Partnership Marketing for the Arizona Cardinals Football Club overseeing the day-to-day operations and direct supervision to the corporate partnership activation and service staff and all related functions. Prior to joining the Cardinals, Ms. Deacon was located in New York City as the Vice President, Solutions and Operations at Oak View Group (Nov 2020 – April 2025), the largest developer of sports and entertainment facilities in the world, with over $5 billion committed spend on new arena developments in various prime global locales. Leading to OVG, Ms. Deacon drove the initial formation and further growth, and development of the Wasserman Experience division in Canada, an industry leading global sports, entertainment and lifestyle company working with some of the world’s most iconic brands, properties and talent.</p>



<p><br>
																<a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651"><br>
							<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="200" height="300" src="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Robert-Pratt-PSI-Website-Head-Shot-682x1024.jpg-200x300.webp" alt="LounGenie leadership team Director Robert Pratt" srcset="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Robert-Pratt-PSI-Website-Head-Shot-682x1024.jpg-200x300.webp 200w, https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Robert-Pratt-PSI-Website-Head-Shot-682x1024.jpg.webp 682w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 200px) 100vw, 200px">								</a></p>



<h6 class="wp-block-heading">Robert Pratt</h6>



<h5 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651">Director</a></h5>



<p>Mr. Pratt is currently the President of R. Pratt Consulting Ltd. From 2018-2024 he was President and Chief Operating Officer at Sandman Hotel Group and Sutton Place Hotels, a Canadian hotel chain. From October 2015 until July 2018, Mr. Pratt was the President of One Lodging Management, responsible for the day-to-day operations of 119 properties.</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Meet the LounGenie Leadership Team​</h2>



<p>Behind every LounGenie deployment is a leadership team with deep expertise in hospitality operations, corporate finance, and global brand marketing. Specifically, this team has guided Pool Safe Inc. from early-stage development to partnerships with some of the world’s most recognized hotel, resort, and waterpark brands. In short, their combined experience drives the strategy, innovation, and operational excellence behind the LounGenie smart cabana system.</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading">Board of Directors</h2>



<p><a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651"><br>
							<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="300" height="200" src="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/David-Berger-300x200.webp" alt="LounGenie leadership team member David Berger CEO" srcset="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/David-Berger-300x200.webp 300w, https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/David-Berger.webp 768w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px">								</a></p>



<h6 class="wp-block-heading">David Berger<br></h6>



<h5 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651">CEO<br>
</a></h5>



<p>Mr. David Berger is Executive Chairman and CEO, Pool Safe Inc. Mr. Berger was formerly the Director of Operations of Kiddie Ride Entertainment Limited, a company he founded to create fun and exciting amusement rides for children, located in shopping malls across southern Ontario. Prior to Kiddie Ride, Mr. Berger held the position of Managing Director at Jodami Enterprises Limited, an Engineering company that provided plumbing and electrical supplies across the Greater Toronto Area.</p>



<p><br>
																<a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651"><br>
							<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="238" height="300" src="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/steven-glaser-10.jpg-238x300.webp" alt="LounGenie leadership team COO CFO Steven Glaser" srcset="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/steven-glaser-10.jpg-238x300.webp 238w, https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/steven-glaser-10.jpg.webp 600w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 238px) 100vw, 238px">								</a></p>



<h6 class="wp-block-heading">Steven Glaser<br></h6>



<h5 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651">COO, CFO & Director<br>
</a></h5>



<p>Mr. Steven Glaser is Chief Operating Officer, Chief Financial Officer and Director, Pool Safe Inc. Mr. Glaser is a financial service executive with a diverse background in corporate finance, communications and governance for private and public companies. He spent the last eight years working in the corporate finance and investment banking arena focused on assisting late stage private and early stage public companies with strategic planning and capital raising. Prior to that, Mr. Glaser spent seven years as Vice President Corporate Affairs of Azure Dynamics Corporation. He was responsible for the company’s corporate governance, its domestic and international stock exchange listings, as well as the build-out of the company’s Investor Relations division. Mr. Glaser holds a Bachelor of Administrative Studies degree as well as an M.B.A. in finance.</p>



<p><br>
																<a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651"><br>
							<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="300" height="300" src="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/M3_7412-Steven-Mintz-Crop-BusinessPortraits.ca_-768x768.jpg-300x300.webp" alt="LounGenie leadership team Director Steven Mintz" srcset="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/M3_7412-Steven-Mintz-Crop-BusinessPortraits.ca_-768x768.jpg-300x300.webp 300w, https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/M3_7412-Steven-Mintz-Crop-BusinessPortraits.ca_-768x768.jpg-150x150.webp 150w, https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/M3_7412-Steven-Mintz-Crop-BusinessPortraits.ca_-768x768.jpg.webp 768w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px">								</a></p>



<h6 class="wp-block-heading">Steven Mintz</h6>



<h5 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651">Director</a></h5>



<p>Mr. Steven Mintz is Director, Pool Safe Inc. Mr. Mintz is a graduate from the University of Toronto and obtained his C.A. designation in June of 1992. Between 1992 and 1997, Mr. Mintz was employed by a boutique bankruptcy and insolvency firm. He obtained his Trustee in Bankruptcy license in 1995. Since January 1997 he has been a self-employed financial consultant, serving private individuals and companies as well as public companies in a variety of industries, including mining, oil and gas, real estate and investment strategies. He is currently a director of 22 Capital Corp, Everton Resources Inc., Mooncor Oil and Gas Corp. and Portage Biotech Inc.</p>



<p><br>
																<a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651"><br>
							<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="225" height="300" src="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/GD-pic-2022-1-768x1024.jpg-225x300.webp" alt="LounGenie leadership team Marketing Executive Gillian Deacon" srcset="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/GD-pic-2022-1-768x1024.jpg-225x300.webp 225w, https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/GD-pic-2022-1-768x1024.jpg.webp 768w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 225px) 100vw, 225px">								</a></p>



<h6 class="wp-block-heading">Gillian Deacon</h6>



<h5 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651">Marketing Executive<br>
</a></h5>



<p>Ms. Deacon brings over 15 years of integrated marketing experience across brand, experiential, partnership and content marketing. Ms. Deacon is currently the Vice President of Partnership Marketing for the Arizona Cardinals Football Club overseeing the day-to-day operations and direct supervision to the corporate partnership activation and service staff and all related functions. Prior to joining the Cardinals, Ms. Deacon was located in New York City as the Vice President, Solutions and Operations at Oak View Group (Nov 2020 – April 2025), the largest developer of sports and entertainment facilities in the world, with over $5 billion committed spend on new arena developments in various prime global locales. Leading to OVG, Ms. Deacon drove the initial formation and further growth, and development of the Wasserman Experience division in Canada, an industry leading global sports, entertainment and lifestyle company working with some of the world’s most iconic brands, properties and talent.</p>



<p><br>
																<a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651"><br>
							<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="200" height="300" src="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Robert-Pratt-PSI-Website-Head-Shot-682x1024.jpg-200x300.webp" alt="LounGenie leadership team Director Robert Pratt" srcset="https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Robert-Pratt-PSI-Website-Head-Shot-682x1024.jpg-200x300.webp 200w, https://loungenie.com/staging/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Robert-Pratt-PSI-Website-Head-Shot-682x1024.jpg.webp 682w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 200px) 100vw, 200px">								</a></p>



<h6 class="wp-block-heading">Robert Pratt</h6>



<h5 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="https://loungenie.com/staging/?page_id=5651">Director</a></h5>



<p>Mr. Pratt is currently the President of R. Pratt Consulting Ltd. From 2018-2024 he was President and Chief Operating Officer at Sandman Hotel Group and Sutton Place Hotels, a Canadian hotel chain. From October 2015 until July 2018, Mr. Pratt was the President of One Lodging Management, responsible for the day-to-day operations of 119 properties.</p>



</div>
